essence: Inspects products and processes to ensure they meet quality standards and regulatory requirements.

identity.title: Quality Control Technician
identity.summary: Performs inspections, measurements, and tests; records results and works with production to resolve non‑conformances.

salary.notes: Specialist inspectors (NDT, metrology) can earn higher salaries.

qualifications: Experience with inspection tools and measurement equipment
Knowledge of quality systems (ISO, AS) and documentation
Attention to detail and strong record keeping
Ability to interpret engineering drawings and specs

lifestyle.description: Shop‑floor role with repetitive inspection tasks and collaboration with production and engineering to maintain standards.
